outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran rejects temporary ceasefire, as Trump sets deadline for reopening Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: CNN leads with Iran rejecting the 45-day ceasefire proposal, refusing to reopen Hormuz under temporary terms. Coverage focuses on Trump's Tuesday deadline and civilian casualties from cluster munitions.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump threatens Iran with 'Hell' over Strait of Hormuz in profane post
outlets.summary: WaPo highlights Trump's expletive-laden Easter Sunday threat. Analysis of escalatory rhetoric and GOP critics including MTG calling Trump 'insane.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran war latest: F-15E crew rescued in daring raid; Hormuz deadline approaches
outlets.summary: Fox News leads with successful F-15E rescue operation. Focus on military successes and Khademi assassination as strategic victory.

outlets.name: Gateway Pundit
outlets.headline: Islamabad Accord — Pakistan scrambles to broker last-minute ceasefire
outlets.summary: Gateway Pundit covers ceasefire proposal skeptically. Frames Iran's rejection as evidence diplomacy is futile.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Tehran says response to ceasefire proposals formulated
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers Iran's formulation of response to ceasefire proposals alongside 25+ killed in US-Israeli strikes across Iranian cities. Detailed coverage of Islamabad Accord proposal.

outlets.name: France 24
outlets.headline: Israel launches new strikes on Lebanon, forces closure of Syria border crossing
outlets.summary: France 24 leads with escalating Lebanon front. 7 killed in Kfar Hatta, 4 killed near Beirut hospital, Masnaa crossing forced closed.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Iran Fires Cluster Munitions at Tel Aviv Area: 28 Hit Sites; Israel Doubts U.S.-Iran Talks, Prepares Extensive Strikes
outlets.summary: Haaretz leads with cluster munitions hitting 28+ sites in Ramat Gan/Bnei Brak/Givatayim. Israeli source says ceasefire talks 'likely to fail' and Israel preparing 'extensive attack.'

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: 4 bodies found in wreckage of Haifa building; cluster missile attack causes widespread damage in central Israel
outlets.summary: Times of Israel leads with Haifa rescue concluding — all 4 missing confirmed dead. Heavy cluster munitions damage across central Israel suburbs.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: US-Israeli attack targets Iran's Sharif University of Technology — blasts rock Tehran
outlets.summary: Press TV leads with strike on Sharif University — Iran's premier engineering institution. Frames as deliberate targeting of civilian academic infrastructure.

outlets.name: Xinhua/Global Times
outlets.headline: Iran's IRGC says targeted U.S. amphibious assault ship LHA-7 Tripoli
outlets.summary: Chinese outlets amplify IRGC claim of targeting USS Tripoli with 5,000+ personnel. No US confirmation. Coverage sympathetic to Iranian resistance narrative.
